summary: Integration-style unit tests for HNSource using httptest server — covers checkpoint logic, concurrency ordering, item filtering, and text composition

observations.text: Uses compile-time interface assertion (var _ source.Source = (*HNSource)(nil)) — consistent with reddit_test.go and rss_test.go. Ensures implementations stay in sync with the interface.
TestHNSource_FetchMessages_OrderPreserved explicitly tests that concurrent item fetching preserves original story-list order, validating the insertion-sort in hn.go.
